title: Chrome Over The Door Hook Hanger, Stylish Heavy-Duty Storage for Coats, Clothes, Towels, Bags, or Robes – 6 Hook Models, with Protective Foam Backing. Brushed Chrome (Silver) stocked in The UK
features: Chrome Over The Door Hook Hanger, Stylish Heavy Duty Storage For Coats, Clothes, Towels, Bags, Or Robes – 6 Hook Models, With Protective Foam Backing. Brushed Chrome Stocked In The Uk
description: Product Description Over Door hooks made of premium 304-stainless steel Chromed, durable and will not deform, never rust even in a humid No Noise Door Hook The back of the door hook organizer is filled with a soft sponge, which makes it easy to close the door without noise and prevents scratching the door. Easy Installation No drilling or assembly is required, Simply hang the two hanging brackets firmly on the door and they can be used immediately High Quality , Sturdy & DURABLE Over door hook is made of high quality metal, larger and stronger than ordinary door hooks. Maximum load-bearing capacity is 45LB, no need to worry about bending and breaking Stylish Design Over Door Hanger This sleek and modern design of Over Door Hooks adds a touch of style to any room. They are perfect for use in bedrooms, bathrooms, closets, and more. Door hooks can be used to organize and hang scarves, belts, ties, shirts, jackets, robes, towels, handbags, jewelry, hats, keys, umbrellas and other accessories. Dimensions Size: 15-3/8” Length x 3” Width x 4-1/4” Height This over the door hooks fit most doors from 1.37" to 1.65" thick This over the door hooks fit most doors from1 3/8 inch to 1 3/4 inch thick. Still, please ensure there is enough clearance on the door: greater than 0.08 inches (about the thickness of a coin) to give you a better use experience.
